---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format: html
---

# Dr. Jayaruwani Fernando

**Senior Lecturer in Agricultural Engineering**  
Rajarata University of Sri Lanka

[📥 Download Full CV (PDF)](files/cv.pdf)

---

## Education

**2022** — PhD in Agricultural & Biosystems Engineering — *University of Peradeniya*

**2017** — MS in Agricultural & Biosystems Engineering — *Iowa State University, USA*

**2015** — MPhil in Agricultural & Biosystems Engineering — *University of Peradeniya*

**2011** — BSc in Agriculture (Second Class Upper) — *Rajarata University*
---

## Academic Appointments

**2017–Present** — Senior Lecturer — *Rajarata University*

**2012–2017** — Lecturer — *Rajarata University*

**2015–2017** — Graduate Research Assistant — *Iowa State University, USA*

---

## Journal Publications (23 total)

### Q1 Journals

1. **Fernando, A.J.** (2026). Artificial intelligence techniques for microwave drying of agricultural products. *Applied Food Research*, 6(1), 101590. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.afres.2025.101590) **(IF: 6.2)**

2. **Fernando, A.J.** & Rosentrater, K.A. (2023). Optimal designs of air-source heat pump dryers. *Food Engineering Reviews*, 15(2), 261–275. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12393-023-09337-3) **(IF: 7.6)**

3. **Fernando, A.J.** & Amaratunga, K.S.P. (2022). Far-infrared radiation for chili pepper. *J Sci Food Agric*, 102(9), 3781–3787. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/jsfa.11726) **(IF: 3.5)**

### Q2 Journals

4. **Fernando, A.J.** & Rathnayake, R.M.S. (2025). Far-infrared drying of cassava. *Journal of the ASABE*, 68(5). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.13031/ja.16287) **(IF: 1.0)**

5. **Fernando, A.J.**, Gunathunga, C., Brumm, T., & Amaratunga, S. (2021). Drying turmeric using far-infrared radiation. *Journal of Food Process Engineering*, 44(9). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1111/jfpe.13780) **(IF: 2.9)**

6. **Fernando, A.J.**, Amaratunga, K.S.P., Madushanka, H.T.N., & Jayaweera, H.R.Y.S. (2021). Drying performance of coffee. *J of the ASABE*, 64(4), 1237–1245. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.13031/trans.14268) **(IF: 1.0)**

### Book Chapter

**Fernando, A.J.** (2026). Technological Transitions in Thermal Drying. In: *IoT and AI in Agriculture*. Springer, pp. 311–341.

[🔗 Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oKLbNdEAAAAJ)

---
## Academic Honors

**2017** — Gamma Sigma Delta — Honor Society of Agriculture

**2017** — Alpha Epsilon — Honor Society of Agricultural & Biological Systems Engineering

**2017** — Epsilon Pi Tau — International Honor Society for Technology Professions

---

## Research Supervision

- **Postgraduate:** 1 M.Sc. student (Machine Learning for drying kinetics)
- **Undergraduate:** 23 projects (2013–2025)

---

## Connect

**Email:** jayaruwani@agri.rjt.ac.lk · jayaruwanifernando@gmail.com

---

*Complete CV with all 23 publications available as PDF download.*
